# PoS Product packaging multi barcode

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module allows to use multiple barcode on a product packaging from the PoS

See <https://github.com/OCA/stock-logistics-barcode/tree/16.0/product_packaging_multi_barcode>

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

1. Navigate to *Inventory > Configuration > Product Packagings*.
2. Select a Packaging item and proceed to input one or multiple barcodes.
3. Return to the *Point of Sale*. You can now utilize barcode scanning functionality for the selected Packaging items.
